para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 Nishant 19/12/20 Added support for vck190.Added ReadModifyWrite() for writing to vck190 register space.set_vphy() renamed to config_phy() and has two parameters for linerate and lanecount.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a training lost interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 KI 07/13/17 Initial release.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 KU 02/05/19 Initial release.

briefdescription.para: This function is the main hpd pulse process.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

briefdescription.para: This function configures Frame Buffer for defined mode The FrramBuffer is put in Autorestart mode for non-Adaptive Sync mode When Adaptive Sync mode is enabled the FrameBuffer is put in manual mode.

detaileddescription.para: XST_SUCCESS if init is OK else XST_FAILURE This function configures Frame Buffer for defined mode The FrramBuffer is put in Autorestart mode for non-Adaptive Sync mode When Adaptive Sync mode is enabled the FrameBuffer is put in manual mode.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if init is OK else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function configures Frame BufferWr for defined mode.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if init is OK else XST_FAILURE
